name: Snail Omelette / Cagouilles En Omelette
recipeInstructions:
1. Preparation time: 15 minutes.
2. Cooking time: 1 hour.
3. Starve the snails and clean them well.
4. Cook the snails for 1 hour in boiling water with added salt, fennel, and a dried fig leaf; drain and remove from their shells.
5. Prepare an omelette mixture by beating the egg yolks and folding in the stiffly beaten whites.
6. Make an omelette in the usual way and fill with the cooked snails.
7. Wine: red or white from Haut-Poitou, Anjou, or Touraine region.
[From "Larousse Traditional French Cooking."]
